pages.name: Home
pages.description: Homepage for starting searches, setting location, viewing featured providers, and jumping into core flows like booking, quotes, or category browsing.
primary_functions: Search for repair services by keyword (e.g., 'iphone 12 screen repair', 'laptop data recovery')
Set or change the current location using ZIP code or city (e.g., 10001, San Francisco, Seattle)
Access quick category shortcuts for common device types (phones, tablets, laptops, home appliances)
Start a generic 'near me' search that leads to the search results page
Access primary site sections via header navigation (favorites, profile, help, categories)

outgoing_connections.trigger: Submit main search form in the hero search bar
Click 'Search near me' button using the current saved location
Click on a quick search example (e.g., 'iPhone screen repair near me')
Click 'Browse all services' or a similar categories call-to-action card

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Home' header link
Default landing page when visiting the site root or index.html directly

pages.name: Search Results
pages.description: Search and listing page to view, filter, sort, compare, and favorite repair providers, with list and map views supporting all task flows.
primary_functions: Display a list of providers matching the current search query and location
Filter providers by distance (e.g., 3, 10, 20, 25 miles) using a distance or radius control
Filter providers by rating thresholds (e.g., 4 stars and up, 4.5 stars and up)
Filter providers by service-specific price caps (e.g., screen replacement under $200, battery replacement under $120, charging port repair under $90, data recovery under $400)
Filter providers by service type and category (e.g., smartphone repair, laptop battery replacement, washing machine repair, laptop data recovery)
Filter providers by visit type and logistics (e.g., on-site/home visit, pickup & delivery, free pickup)
Filter providers by availability and hours (e.g., open on Saturday, closing after 5:00 PM on Saturdays, 24/7 or emergency service)
Filter providers by fees and benefits (e.g., no diagnostic fee, free diagnostic, no fix-no fee)
Sort providers by criteria such as rating high to low, price low to high, and distance nearest first
Switch between list view and map view, with a map-based display of provider pins around the chosen location
Select providers for comparison using 'Add to Compare' controls and open the comparison view
Open individual provider detail pages by clicking on provider cards or names
Optionally save providers directly to favorites from the results list

incoming_params.description: Search query text entered by the user, such as 'iPhone 12 screen repair' or 'laptop data recovery'.
Location text (ZIP or city/state, e.g., '10001' or 'San Francisco, CA') to be used as location_text in searches.
Optional service_code preset (e.g., 'smartphone_screen_repair', 'laptop_data_recovery') to focus results on a particular service.
Optional ServiceCategory.id used to pre-filter providers by a selected category such as 'Home Appliances'.
Maximum search radius in miles (e.g., 3, 10, 20, 25) applied to distance_miles_max.
Minimum average rating filter (e.g., 4 or 4.5) applied to rating_min.
Maximum price for the currently focused service (e.g., 200, 120, 90, 400) used to build price_filter.
If true, restricts results to providers supporting in-store services.
If true, restricts results to providers offering home visits / on-site repair.
If true, restricts results to providers offering pickup & delivery.
If true, restricts results to providers that offer free pickup.
If true, filters providers that are open on Saturdays.
Optional closing-time filter for a specific day (e.g., '17:00' for after 5 PM on Saturday).
If true, restricts results to providers that are open 24/7.
If true, restricts results to providers offering emergency service.
If true, filters providers advertising free diagnostic.
If true, filters providers with no diagnostic fee (diagnostic fee = $0).
If true, filters providers with a no-fix-no-fee policy.
Sort key such as 'rating_desc', 'price_asc', or 'distance_asc' mapped to sort_by.
View mode toggle for the page, typically 'list' or 'map', mapped to view_mode.
Pagination index (1-based) for results, mapped to page.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a provider card or provider name in the results list or map sidebar
Click the 'Compare (N)' button to open the comparison view for selected providers

access_methods.description: Accessed when any search is submitted from the home page, category browsing, or global header search using the q/location parameters.
Refreshed via in-page filter and sort controls using query parameters in the URL.

pages.name: Provider Detail
pages.description: Detailed provider page including services, pricing, hours, warranties, reviews, and actions such as bookings, quotes, home visits, pickups, messaging, and reviews.
primary_functions: Show provider information, including name, address, phone number, operating hours, and service areas
Display services offered with indicative pricing (e.g., screen replacement, battery replacement, HDMI port repair, washing machine repair, data recovery, charging port repair)
Display key attributes for decision-making such as rating, number of reviews, warranties (e.g., repair warranty duration), diagnostic fee policy, free diagnostic, and no fix-no fee options
Allow booking of in-store appointments for device repairs (e.g., book iPhone 12 screen repair with specific date and time, contact details, and notes)
Allow requesting quotes or estimates for services (e.g., laptop battery replacement quote including brand, model, and issue description)
Allow requesting home visits / on-site service bookings for appliances (e.g., washing machine repair with address, preferred time, and issue description)
Allow scheduling pickup and delivery repairs, including specifying device type, brand, issue, pickup date and time window, and contact details
Provide a general contact form to send messages or questions to the provider (e.g., ask about laptop data recovery turnaround time and cost under a budget)
Provide a 'Call Now' or phone action to initiate a call to the provider from supported devices
Allow saving or unsaving the provider to a personal favorites list
Display user reviews, ratings, and review details for the provider
Provide a form to write and submit a new review, including selecting a star rating, entering review text, and choosing a visit type such as smartphone repair

incoming_params.description: Provider.id for the provider to display. Required for loading provider details, services, and actions.
Optional service_code to pre-focus the UI on a particular service (e.g., show the 'iPhone 12 screen repair' section or data recovery section first).
Optional navigation context such as 'search', 'favorites', or 'compare' used for breadcrumbs or 'Back to results' links.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View all favorites' after saving this provider to favorites
Click 'View comparison list' after adding this provider to compare

access_methods.description: Accessed via links from search results, favorites, and compare pages using the providerId parameter.

pages.name: Compare Providers
pages.description: Side-by-side comparison view for selected repair providers, focusing on ratings, prices, warranty length, and diagnostic policies to support choices like PS5 HDMI port repair.
primary_functions: Display selected providers in a side-by-side table with key attributes (rating, price ranges, warranty length, diagnostic fee policy, benefits like free diagnostic and no fix-no fee)
Highlight differences in warranty duration to help choose the provider with the longest repair warranty
Allow removing providers from the comparison or adding another provider (within the comparison limit)
Provide direct links or buttons to view the full detail page for any provider shown in the comparison
Support continuing to the chosen provider’s detail page to then save it to favorites or take further actions

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View Details' or a provider name in the comparison table
Click 'Go to favorites' after saving a provider from the comparison view

access_methods.description: Opened from search results or provider detail when the user clicks 'Compare (N)'; providers to compare are loaded via getCompareView.

pages.name: Favorites
pages.description: Personal list of saved providers that the user has marked as favorites to revisit top choices, such as the best PS5 HDMI port repair or preferred phone repair shop.
primary_functions: Display a list of providers that the user has saved as favorites for easy access
Show summary information for each saved provider (name, rating, key services, location)
Allow navigating to each provider’s detail page from the favorites list
Allow removing providers from favorites
Help the user quickly revisit preferred services, such as the provider with the longest warranty for PS5 HDMI port repair

incoming_params.description: Optional Provider.id that was most recently added to favorites; may be highlighted for the user.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a provider card or 'View details' button in the favorites list
Click 'Find similar services near this provider' on a favorite provider card

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Favorites' header link
Optional highlightProviderId parameter when redirected after saving a provider to favorites.

pages.name: Profile & Preferences
pages.description: Single-user profile page for creating and updating contact details and preferred location, used to prefill booking, quote, pickup, home visit, and review forms.
primary_functions: Collect and store basic user profile information such as name, email address, and phone number for pre-filling forms
Optionally let the user define a preferred home location (e.g., ZIP 10001, Chicago 60601, Seattle, San Francisco) used as a default search location
Allow the user to manage communication preferences (e.g., preferred contact method, consent to be contacted by providers)
Act as the destination for a header 'Create Account / Profile' link that stands in for account setup in this single-user context

incoming_params.description: Optional path to return to after saving profile (e.g., a provider detail URL); may be used for inline prompts but is not required for core flows.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Save profile and go to home' after successfully saving profile information

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Create Account / Profile' header link
Optional redirect parameter may be present when opened from inline prompts.

pages.name: Browse Categories
pages.description: Overview of major repair categories with subcategories, used to start searches like washing machine repair, smartphone repair, or laptop services without typing queries.
primary_functions: Display main service categories such as smartphone repair, tablet repair, laptop repair, game console repair, and home appliance repair
Show subcategories where relevant (e.g., under Home Appliances: washing machine repair, dryer repair, refrigerator repair)
Allow the user to click a category or subcategory to open a pre-filtered search on the search results page (e.g., washing machine repair near a chosen ZIP)
Support discovery of services for users who do not have a specific keyword in mind

incoming_params.description: Optional ServiceCategory.id, used when deep-linking directly into a specific parent category (e.g., 'home_appliance_repair').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a main category card (e.g., 'Smartphone repair', 'Home appliances')
Click on a subcategory such as 'Washing machine repair'

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Browse Services' header link
Optional parentCategoryId parameter supports deep linking into a specific category view.

pages.name: About
pages.description: Explains what the electronic repair directory is, what devices and services it covers, and how providers and ratings are managed.
primary_functions: Explain the mission and value of the directory (helping users find and compare repair providers easily)
Describe the types of services and devices covered (phones, tablets, laptops, consoles, home appliances, data recovery, etc.)
Provide background on how providers are listed, how ratings are gathered, and how pricing information is handled

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'About' footer link
Can be visited directly via about.html

pages.name: How It Works
pages.description: Step-by-step explanation of how to use the site to search, filter, compare providers, and submit bookings or messages.
primary_functions: Outline typical user journeys such as searching, filtering, comparing providers, booking appointments, requesting quotes, and scheduling home visits or pickups
Explain how ratings, reviews, prices, and warranties should be interpreted when choosing providers
Clarify what happens after a booking, quote request, or message is submitted to a provider

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a 'Start your search' button in the How It Works content

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'How It Works' header link
Accessible via the 'How It Works' footer link

pages.name: Help & FAQ
pages.description: Support and frequently asked questions covering search, filters, map view, booking flows, and troubleshooting issues.
primary_functions: Answer common questions about searching, filtering, using map view, and booking services
Provide troubleshooting tips for issues like not seeing any providers in a certain radius or not being able to submit a form
Link to the contact page for additional support if the FAQs do not resolve the user’s question

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Contact support' link from an FAQ entry

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Help' header link
Accessible via the 'Help & FAQ' footer link

pages.name: Contact Us
pages.description: Contact page for sending general questions or feedback about the directory, independent of any specific repair provider.
primary_functions: Provide a contact form for users to submit general inquiries or feedback about the directory itself
Display alternative contact information such as a support email address or business mailing address
Offer a way to request help if users encounter problems with bookings, messages, or other site features

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Contact Us' footer link
Can be visited directly via contact.html
Submitting the contact form triggers submitSiteContactMessage but keeps the user on this page with a confirmation state.

pages.name: Terms of Use
pages.description: Legal terms and conditions for using the repair directory website, including responsibilities and liabilities.
primary_functions: Present the terms governing use of the website, including any limitations of liability and responsibilities
Explain the relationship between the directory, users, and listed providers
Outline any rules regarding reviews, ratings, and content submitted by the user

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Terms of Use' footer link
Can be visited directly via terms.html

pages.name: Privacy Policy
pages.description: Explains what data the site collects, how it is used and shared, and what rights users have over their data.
primary_functions: Explain what personal information may be collected (e.g., profile details, booking information) and how it is used
Describe how data is stored, protected, and shared with providers when the user submits requests
Detail user rights regarding their data and how to contact the site operator with privacy concerns

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Privacy Policy' footer link
Can be visited directly via privacy.html

header_links.description: Homepage with main search and location selection
Browse repair providers by category and device type
View saved repair providers for quick access
Learn how to search, compare, and book repair services
Help and FAQ about using the repair directory
Set up or edit personal profile details used for bookings and reviews

footer_links.description: Overview of how to use the site
Frequently asked questions and support information
Contact form and support contact details
Legal terms for using the website
Information about data collection and privacy practices
